description: The chatMutation.onError callback does NOT wrap API response parsing in try/catch. If the error object has an unexpected shape, accessing getErrorMessage(err) could throw and crash the component. Wrap the onError logic in try/catch and provide a fallback message.
successCriteria: chatMutation.onError wraps error handling in try/catch
Falls back to a generic error message if parsing fails
Component does not crash on malformed error responses
